nasb.text: Who teaches us more than the beasts of the earth And makes us wiser than the birds of the heavens?’

esv.text: who teaches us more than the beasts of the earth and makes us wiser than the birds of the heavens?’

cnv.text: 他教導我們過於教導地上的走獸， 使我們有智慧勝於空中的飛鳥。’

ccb.text: 使我们比地上的走兽聪明， 比天上的飞鸟有智慧。’
